briefdescription.para: Definition of the miniumum metrics interval for release mode.
Definition of the maxiumum metrics interval.
Definition of the miniumum RMS Threshold.
Definition of the maxiumum RMS Threshold
Definition of the miniumum raw data transfers per day.
Definition of the maxiumum raw data transfers per day.
